task_completion.description: Verify that the correct ReqView project is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is open and the project explorer or title bar shows 'trace_content_project'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the traceability links column, link creation dialog, or traceability matrix is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Links' column is visible in the document view, or a dialog box for creating links between SRS and NEEDS is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Satisfaction link is created between SRS-901 and NEEDS-801.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the row or properties for SRS-901 (Data Encryption / AES-256), there is a visible link indicator (e.g., 'Satisfies NEEDS-801' or an outgoing link to NEEDS-801).

task_completion.description: Verify that a Satisfaction link is created between SRS-902 and NEEDS-802.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the row or properties for SRS-902 (API Response Time / 200ms), there is a visible link indicator (e.g., 'Satisfies NEEDS-802' or an outgoing link to NEEDS-802).

task_completion.description: Verify that a Satisfaction link is created between SRS-903 and NEEDS-803.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the row or properties for SRS-903 (Visual Accessibility / WCAG), there is a visible link indicator (e.g., 'Satisfies NEEDS-803' or an outgoing link to NEEDS-803).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the ReqView GUI to create the links.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the ReqView application interface, not a text editor (like VS Code, nano, or vim) editing the underlying .json files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'sed', 'jq', or python scripts being executed to modify SRS.json or NEEDS.json.

integrity.description: Verify that actual traceability links were created, rather than just typing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The links should appear in the dedicated 'Links' column or traceability section of ReqView, not just as text manually typed into the requirement's description or custom text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct traceability links the agent must establish are: SRS-901 to NEEDS-801 (Encryption to Privacy), SRS-902 to NEEDS-802 (Latency to Performance), and SRS-903 to NEEDS-803 (Accessibility to Inclusivity). The project data is located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/trace_content_project/.
